title: Nor'easter - January 2026
description: Major nor'easter that impacted the Northeast United States with heavy snow, strong winds, and coastal flooding in late January 2026.
impacts: Heavy snow accumulations of 8-16 inches in eastern New England
Coastal flooding during high tide cycles
Significant travel disruptions across the region

seo.title: Nor'easter January 2026 Live Tracker | Real-Time Alerts & Radar
seo.description: Track the January 2026 nor'easter in real-time. Live weather alerts, radar, and snow forecasts for New England and Mid-Atlantic states.
seo.keywords: noreaster, northeast storm, nor'easter january 2026, winter storm northeast, new england snow storm

emergency_summary.title: Emergency Status
items: ❄️ Winter Storm Warning in effect for coastal New England
🌊 Coastal flood advisory for high tide cycles

emergency_entries.title: City warming centers open
emergency_entries.description: Twelve warming centers are open 24 hours for residents without heat or power. Bring ID if possible.

emergency_entries.title: Travel ban lifted on secondary roads
emergency_entries.description: MassDOT reports main highways are passable with caution. Secondary roads remain hazardous in western counties.

emergency_entries.title: Power restoration underway
emergency_entries.description: Utility crews are prioritizing hospitals and emergency services. Estimated restoration for most customers: 48–72 hours.

emergency_entries.title: Schools closed Wednesday
emergency_entries.description: Most public school districts have announced closures for Wednesday. Check your district website for remote learning plans.

emergency_entries.title: Voluntary evacuation — low-lying coastal areas
emergency_entries.description: Voluntary evacuation recommended for flood-prone neighborhoods ahead of tonight's high tide. Shelters listed on mass.gov.
